List<Translation>.Text: Enable 7~10 Simple Description buttons of EGO Gifts

Drop-down lists only consider folders from:
<size=92%><font="Consolas">[⇲] Assets Directory\※ Internal\Translation
[⇲] Assets Directory\※ Internal\Themes</font></size>

Allows create localization files directly from the program, add/remove objects to the <size=92%><font="Consolas">dataList</font></size>, add/remove descriptions of these objects via the context menu of buttons.

Read documentation by clicking on the hyperlink icon <color={Theme.HyperlinkColor}>⯑</color> in the option name.
Skip Skills Data reading on startup

Skills Data reading just noticeably takes time on startup.

Enable this if you don't use Skill Names Replication. Disabling this option will automatically read Skills Data files.

Don't convert [KeywordID] with an unknown keyword ID to green "Unknown" text in Skills and Passives localization files.

This means allowing free use of square brackets.

Disable Text Elements Sealing in Identity/E.G.O Preview Creator<size=88%> <hyperlink="https://translation-devouring-siltcurren.gitbook.io/lc-localization-interface/additional-features/custom-identity-e.g.o-preview-creator#optimization-specific"><color={Theme.HyperlinkColor}>⯑</color></hyperlink></size>

All Skill/Passive text elements in columns are captured in a static image if they aren't interacted with, as they LITERALLY KILL scrolling performance due to the complex inner structure and drop shadow effect presence (Excluding Keywords and including Decorative Cautions).

In exchange, RAM consumption increases, which is especially noticeable in Previews with many text elements (e.g. Ring Apprentice Faust (Albina Identity) with 9 Skills).

It just automatically executes Ctrl + S hotkey after specified delay when typing text in main text editor or right menu. But be careful when switching too quickly from description to description, because the activated autosave timer may be finished on the description you switched to, leaving the previous one (Nevertheless, the dialog about unsaved changes will indicate this).

Preloaded Image Info for Custom Identity/E.G.O Preview Creator<size=88%> <hyperlink="https://translation-devouring-siltcurren.gitbook.io/lc-localization-interface/additional-features/custom-identity-e.g.o-preview-creator#preloading-image-info"><color={Theme.HyperlinkColor}>⯑</color></hyperlink></size>

Larger Scale Factor = higher quality, more time to scan content, larger file size, and A LOT of RAM usage (Up to ~1.8 GB)[b].[/b]

Two last options is applied to all keywords that ultimately fit the [size=92%][font="Consolas"]<​sprite name="..."><​color><​u><​link="...">...</​link><​/u><​/color>[/font][/size] pattern (With any order of opening and closing [size=92%][font="Consolas"]<​link="...">[/font][/size], [size=92%][font="Consolas"]<​u>[/font][/size], and [size=92%][font="Consolas"]<​color>[/font][/size] tags)[b].[/b]
